name: Heidi
bio:
Former Scientist who turned into a monster after an experiment accident. He uses poison gas equipment to heal and support allies, protecting humans.

Role: Powerful Heal
Specialty: A backline Support-type hero with strong recovery ability; an essential support for sustained combat lineups.

skillSlots.name: Chemical Party
skillSlots.description: Heals all ally Heroes for 80% of Heidi's ATK.

skillSlots.name: Frenzy Elixir
skillSlots.description: Heals ally with lowest HP percentage for 400% of Heidi's ATK; if target's HP is below 30%, additionally heals 20% Max HP (cannot exceed 400% of caster's ATK).

effects.name: Overdose Injection
effects.description: When using [Chemical Party], additionally applies [Infection Potion] to 2 highest-ATK allies.

effects.name: Overdose Injection
effects.description: [Infection Potion] increases target's Crit DMG by 10%.

effects.name: Overdose Injection
effects.description: Applies [First Aid Potion] to self at battle start.

effects.name: Overdose Injection
effects.description: Applies [First Aid Potion] to ally with highest crit rate at battle start.
